I.title: Misdiagnosis Rates
I.x: 1 in 3 adults receives a wrong or delayed diagnosis annually, leading to avoidable harm

I.title: Excessive Wait Times
I.x: Average ER wait exceeds 4 hours; specialist referrals take weeks, delaying critical care

I.title: Fragmented Data Silos
I.x: Patient records scattered across 5+ disconnected systems, blocking coordinated care

B.x: These compounding failures drive $935B in annual waste across the US healthcare system.
